defects: forbidden prop: goalpost dead-center far end
unspecced school buildings behind track (no signage)
full yard grid vs single 50-yard line (minor, all variants)
verdicts.notes: Strongest image otherwise — numerals fully suppressed.

defects: camera: low near-ground oblique, field cut off
geometry: impossible line convergence + beige band through grass
bleachers: dark clumped blobs across seating rows — seated figures or melted debris; uncertain = FAIL
verdicts.notes: One defect from passing; all else clean.

defects: geometry: tripled sideline + concrete walkways inside the grass

progress: v2 prompt successfully killed the yard-number failure mode (zero numerals in all 4). New failure modes: goalpost, occupied/melted bleachers, low cameras, invented walkways.
resubmit_guidance: Prompt v3 per judge: bare end zones (goalpost ban early + 'no posts or uprights of any kind'), 'bleacher seats completely EMPTY, clean bare aluminum rows', 'each boundary is ONE single line — no doubled/tripled lines, no concrete strips/paths/walkways touching the grass', 'camera HIGH and elevated, aerial three-quarter view, entire field + full track ring in frame'. Accept full unnumbered yard-line grid (model paints it regardless; lines without numbers were always legal).
